name: python3-rich-argparse
title: python3-rich-argparse
summary: Rich help formatters for argparse and optparse
description:
Rich help formatters for argparse and optparse
Format argparse and optparse help using rich (https://pypi.org/project/rich).
.
Improves the look and readability of argparse's help while requiring minimal
changes to the code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-rich-argparse because Rich help formatters for argparse and optparse.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-rich-argparse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-rich-argparse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-rich-argparse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
